title: Falling
overview: After the incident with Lu Guang, Cheng is forced to deal with the devastating situation and is forced to pay the debt as things begin to uncover.

title: Night Raid
overview: Cheng and Qiao Ling need to fight to solve the situation, while Inspector Xiao Li attends Inspector Chen Bin.

title: Two Funerals
overview: Cheng and Qiao encounter a familiar face that comes to their aid. However, they later find themselves at a funeral.

title: Them In The Photo
overview: Qian Jin continues to look for Liu Min's phone while Lu Guang and Cheng investigate the photo that was given to Lu Guang.

title: Last Supper
overview: Cheng and Lu Guang continue to investigate the photo but in doing so, they uncover the dark past that hid within the picture.

title: Li Tianxi
overview: Cheng begins to interrogate Li Tianxi unknowing of her intentions, in doing so, the police and the others stress, as things take a confusing turn.

title: Urban Warfare
overview: As Li Tianxi and Cheng continue their ulterior motive, inspectors Xiao Li and Wang Juan indulge in a physical and psychological battle in hopes to expose their intentions.

title: Hostage
overview: With Lu Guangs sudden interference Cheng and Qiao are left perplexed and saved, however, things take a sharp turn ruining the situation even more.

title: Three Stories
overview: As Cheng continues his mission in the past, Li Tianchen and Qian Jin's backstories uncover, revealing their true natures.

title: Improvise
overview: After learning the secrets to Li Tianchen's powers, Cheng comes up with a strategy to try and save Lu Guang but things don't end up going as planned.

title: Confrontation
overview: Cheng comes up with a tactical strategy to try and save both himself and Lu Guang, however Qian Jing proves that he is one step ahead and things end up going unexpectedly for both sides.

title: Can't Live Without a Good Brother
overview: There are rules, and they must be followed. What is the price to pay when one of them is broken?
